Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 44 

IMG_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Imaging Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for imaging services (IMG) for a given year. Claims for 
imaging procedures are a subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the Part B carrier and DME 
data files. 

These imaging claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the
